title: Maya survives every cmds.* surface the #248 commit series was supposed to harden

arguments.code:
import maya.cmds as c, os
result = {'pid': os.getpid(), 'version': c.about(version=True), 'autosave': bool(c.autoSave(query=True, enable=True))}
print('VRS_BEFORE', result)
result

import maya.cmds as c
c.file(new=True, force=True)
result = {'meshes': len(c.ls(type='mesh'))}
print('VRS_FILE_NEW_OK', result)
result

import maya.cmds as c, random
cubes = []
for i in range(10):
    cube = c.polyCube()[0]
    c.move(random.uniform(-10, 10), random.uniform(0, 5), random.uniform(-10, 10), cube)
    cubes.append(cube)
result = {'count': len(cubes)}
print('VRS_CUBES_OK', result)
result

import maya.cmds as c
dl_shape = c.directionalLight()
al_shape = c.ambientLight()
c.setAttr('defaultRenderGlobals.currentRenderer', 'arnold', type='string')
result = {'directional_shape': dl_shape, 'ambient_shape': al_shape, 'renderer': c.getAttr('defaultRenderGlobals.currentRenderer')}
print('VRS_LIGHTS_AND_RENDERER_OK', result)
result

import maya.cmds as c, os
result = {'pid': os.getpid(), 'mesh_count': len(c.ls(type='mesh')), 'still_alive': True}
print('VRS_AFTER', result)
result
